'''''1138''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] as part of [[Task Force Vengeance]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], ''1138'' was destroyed by the [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']] as a diversion by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Skirmish near Almaran]].

==Behind the scenes==
[[1138 (easter egg)|1138]] is a recurring number in ''[[Star Wars]]''. It is a reference to the early [[George Lucas]] film ''THX-1138''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
